task_completion.description: Title is formatted correctly and Table of Contents is present.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Sunny Creek Organics - Annual On-Site Inspection Report' is at the top of the document, centered, bolded, and visibly larger than the body text (>=16pt). Immediately below the title, there is a generated Table of Contents.

task_completion.description: The 6 main sections are formatted as Heading 1 and the 4 subsections as Heading 2.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 6 main sections (e.g., 'General Information', 'Organic System Plan Verification') are visibly styled as Heading 1 (large, bold). The 4 subsections (e.g., 'Buffer Zones', 'Input Materials') are styled as Heading 2 (slightly smaller than H1, but distinct from body text). The Table of Contents should reflect these heading levels.

task_completion.description: Crop data is converted into a 3-column table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: There is a visible 3-column table grid containing the crop data, including keywords like 'Carrots', 'Tomatoes', 'Lettuce', 'Acreage', and 'Estimated Yield'.

task_completion.description: Input materials are formatted as a bulleted list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The input materials ('Fish emulsion', 'Neem oil', 'Compost', 'Liquid kelp') are formatted with actual bullet points, indented from the left margin.
The specific citations '7 CFR § 205.201', '7 CFR § 205.203', '7 CFR § 205.205', and '7 CFR § 205.400' appear in bold font weight within the text.

task_completion.description: The body text of the document is justified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The standard paragraph text (e.g., paragraphs starting with 'The inspection was conducted...') has straight, flush margins on both the left and right sides, indicating justified alignment.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI word processor to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the document open in LibreOffice Writer or a similar GUI word processor, not a plain text editor or terminal window.

integrity.description: Formatting is applied using word processor features, not plain text symbols.
integrity.visual_evidence: The table is a real grid, bullets are actual list items (not typed asterisks or hyphens), and headings are styled text (not markdown '#' symbols).

integrity.description: The final document is saved to the correct path.
integrity.visual_evidence: The word processor's title bar or a file explorer window shows the file is named 'sunny_creek_audit_report.odt' and is located in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target file: /home/ga/Documents/sunny_creek_audit_report.odt. Title must be exactly 'Sunny Creek Organics - Annual On-Site Inspection Report'. Expected H1 sections: General Information, Organic System Plan Verification, Natural Resources, Seeds and Planting Stock, Crop Pest and Disease Management, Audit Trail and Traceability. Expected H2 subsections: Buffer Zones, Input Materials, Crop Rotation, Non-Compliance Citations. Citations to bold: 7 CFR § 205.201, 7 CFR § 205.203, 7 CFR § 205.205, 7 CFR § 205.400. Table must contain: Carrots, Tomatoes, Lettuce, Acreage, Estimated Yield. Bulleted list must contain: Fish emulsion, Neem oil, Compost, Liquid kelp. Body text samples to check for justification: 'The inspection was conducted on August 14, 2025', 'The producer's organic system plan', 'All seeds used during the current organic production cycle'.
